channel.title: 📣 [Announcements] The final release of Frontity 1.0 is here!
channel.description:
Today, we’re incredibly excited to introduce Frontity 1.0 to the world! 🎉
You can read our blog post about the release here: [https://frontity.org/blog/announcing-frontity-1-0/](https://frontity.org/blog/announcing-frontity-1-0/).

item.title: 📣 [Announcements] The final release of Frontity 1.0 is here!
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi Patrik! Welcome!

And thanks for your question! Unfortunately, comments were not ready for the release. They will be supported once the wp-comments extension is ready. If you’ve subscribed to our newsletter, you will be notified as soon as new extensions like this are released.

If there is anything else I can help with, let me know!

Read full topic
item.source: 📣 [Announcements] The final release of Frontity 1.0 is here!

item.title: 📣 [Announcements] The final release of Frontity 1.0 is here!
item.dc:creator: patrik
item.description:
Congratulations, big achievement!

Out of curiously, did comments make it into the release?

Read full topic
item.source: 📣 [Announcements] The final release of Frontity 1.0 is here!

item.title: 📣 [Announcements] The final release of Frontity 1.0 is here!
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Feel free to give it a RT: https://twitter.com/frontity/status/1141740490225790976

Read full topic
